channel.title: MCP Radar — new MCP servers
channel.description: New and trending Model Context Protocol servers, auto-discovered from GitHub daily.

item.title: upvoteclub/upvote-club-mcp-remote
item.description: Streamable HTTP remote MCP for Upvote.club. Part of upvoteclub/upvote-club-mcp-* family — see core repo for all packages. — ⭐43, JavaScript

item.title: upvoteclub/upvote-club-mcp-mcpb
item.description: Claude Desktop .mcpb bundle for Upvote.club. Part of upvoteclub/upvote-club-mcp-* family — see core repo for all packages. — ⭐43, JavaScript

item.title: upvoteclub/upvote-club-mcp-apps
item.description: MCP Apps with task progress UI for Upvote.club. Part of upvoteclub/upvote-club-mcp-* family — see core repo for all packages. — ⭐43, JavaScript

item.title: illiahaidar/mcptrustchecker
item.description: MCP security scanner — offline, deterministic A–F Trust Score for Model Context Protocol servers. Detects tool poisoning, prompt injection & toxic flows. — ⭐27, TypeScript

item.title: upvoteclub/upvote-club-mcp-local
item.description: Self-serve stdio MCP for Upvote.club. Part of upvoteclub/upvote-club-mcp-* family — see core repo for all packages. — ⭐24, JavaScript

item.title: upvoteclub/upvote-club-mcp-core
item.description: Shared MCP server for Upvote.club Public API. Hub repo — links to local, mcpb, remote, apps packages. — ⭐13, JavaScript

item.title: 12122J/mcpvet
item.description: MCP security scanner — vet a Model Context Protocol server before you add it to Claude Code, Cursor, or Windsurf. Grades it A–F, catching credential theft, tool-poisoning, and install-script payloads — ⭐10, JavaScript

item.title: 8NobleTruths/sabba
item.description: SABBA - Security Templates CLI & MCP Server for coding agents that prove every finding by running it — ⭐6, Python

item.title: DukeDeSouth/tokendiet-mcp
item.description: Local MCP server that compresses agent context payloads before they enter the model — with honest BPE counts and safety rollback. — ⭐5, TypeScript

item.title: agentIgris/AgentFund
item.description: Fundraising infrastructure for AI agents on Solana — x402 payments, milestone escrow, on-chain reputation. REST + WebSocket + MCP + ACP. — ⭐5, TypeScript

item.title: howshannon/trust-issues
item.description: Adversarial security review for AI skills, repos, MCP servers, and packages before you install them. A read-only scanner plus a five-persona reasoning pass, ending in a GO / GO WITH MITIGATIONS / NO-G — ⭐4, Shell

item.title: Cocabadger/tick-mcp
item.description: An MCP time server that keeps your AI honest about time. Zero-dependency clock + drift guard for Claude Desktop, Claude Code, and claude.ai — local, remote, and hook flavors. — ⭐4, Python

item.title: infino-ai/code-context
item.description: Local code search for AI coding agents: a CLI and MCP server with hybrid keyword + semantic search and SQL relevance-ranked aggregation over an index in plain files. No accounts, no keys, no server. — ⭐4, TypeScript

item.title: mienetic/mnema
item.description: 🧠 Mnema — Long-term memory for AI via MCP × Vector DB. Solves the context-window problem with pluggable vector backends (Chroma/Qdrant/sqlite-vec), hybrid search, decay scoring, and summarization. — ⭐3, Python

item.title: ieranama/discomcp
item.description: Teach any AI agent how you use an MCP server – Soft-Landing to your AI integrations — ⭐3, Rust

item.title: DanceNitra/mnemo
item.description: Zero-dependency agent memory + MCP server. Value-ranked recall, consolidation, and a first-class correction & erasure channel (revert, lineage-aware retraction, tamper-evident receipts). Measured inte — ⭐3, Python

item.title: mergeos-bounties/mt5-mcp
item.description: mt5-mcp — MCP server for MetaTrader 5 account, positions, and history — ⭐3, Python

item.title: kanetran29/uigraph
item.description: Your app generates its own verified UI transition graph — screens as nodes, guarded (event, effect) edges. Proof-gated verification, trust tiers, model-free MCP for AI agents. — ⭐3, TypeScript

item.title: RealSlimShady2000/SevereMCP
item.description: Control the Severe Roblox external with an AI agent — run Luau, inspect the game, read memory, build ESP/aimbot/auto-farms, all from chat. MCP server + in-Severe Luau bridge. — ⭐3, Python

item.title: iannuttall/seo
item.description: The only SEO skill your agent needs. 50+ SEO audit tools through a local CLI and MCP server, using your own crawl, Search Console, and GA4 data. — ⭐3, TypeScript

item.title: MapleMapleCat/Grok_Search_Mcp
item.description: Grok MCP is a secure, self-hosted MCP server that brings Grok-powered real-time web and X search to AI clients with API key management, quotas, usage analytics, and an embedded administration panel. — ⭐3, Go

item.title: hbhqq9/bde-score
item.description: 🏆 Open-source multi-factor stock scoring API (0-100) | US/HK/A-Share 74 stocks | Zero signup | shields.io badges | GitHub Action | EU AI Act compliant — ⭐3, Python

item.title: pueschel88/Tradingview-MCP
item.description: Tradingview MCP server for controlling Tradingview Desktop from Claude Code via Chrome DevTools Protocol — ⭐132, TypeScript

item.title: herry2059/project-os-for-codex
item.description: Open-source control plane for Codex projects: Git-backed context, visible agent progress, scoped MCP access, resumable work, and safe handoffs. — ⭐104, TypeScript

item.title: sher1096/klinepic-agent-api-examples
item.description: Tested MCP server, MCPB, Docker, and OpenAPI for annotated post-trade candlestick charts from broker or exchange fills. — ⭐20, JavaScript

item.title: Brokenwatch24/crowdmind
item.description: Desktop app for building AI persona panels and testing stimuli against them (Electron + React + TypeScript) — ⭐7, TypeScript

item.title: oyekamal/claude-code-flow-visualizer
item.description: 🔍 Visualize any Claude Code agent harness — CLAUDE.md, subagents, skills, commands, hooks & MCP servers — as an interactive flow graph. Import from GitHub, ZIP, or local folder. 100% client-side. — ⭐6, JavaScript

item.title: vidhyampp/MCP-Test-Framework
item.description: AI-augmented Playwright + pytest framework for testing MCP servers and UI flows, with optional self-healing, visual triage, fuzzing, and flaky-test analysis. — ⭐5, Python

item.title: michaelellis003/paperboy
item.description: MCP server that delivers research papers to your e-reader — Zotero as the source of truth. Search, discover, queue, and send to Kindle/Kobo from Claude. — ⭐5, Python

item.title: chadru/assessor-lookup-public
item.description: API-first county assessor record lookup, MLS discrepancy checks, and a local MCP server for appraisers. — ⭐5, Python
